name: How to Create a Poll on Meta Business Suite
description: Learn how to create a poll on Meta Business Suite with our step-by-step guide. Engage your audience and gather valuable insights in just a few clicks!
main_title: How to Create a Poll on Meta Business Suite
richtext:
Unfortunately, you can no longer create polls on Facebook or Meta Business Suite. But you can still create great, engaging posts on Meta Business Suite! Here’s how to create posts on Meta Business Suite (instead of polls).

‍

1. Click on “Create Post” on your Meta Business Suite page.

2. From there, you can create a poll on Meta Business Suite by asking questions to your audience. Even if you can’t create polls, you should still engage your audience by asking questions.

3. Lastly, click “Publish” to publish your post.

‍

Creating interactive posts while polls are disabled can help engage your audience. Your customers would love to give their input!

‍
